channel.title: World
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from World, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Middle East crisis live: White House says Trump ‘satisfied’ with blockade after Iran says it seized two ships in strait of Hormuz
item.description: White House says Trump ‘understands Iran is in a very weak position’; state media says the ships have been transferred to Iran’s coast ‘Impossible’ to...

item.title: Lebanon accuses Israel of blocking attempt to rescue journalist after bomb strike
item.description: Journalists Amal Khalil and Zeinab Faraj were both caught in an Israeli attack in southern Lebanon, with the former trapped under rubble for hours Isr...

item.title: Inquiry clears Bristol school of antisemitism for postponing Jewish MP’s visit
item.description: Independent review into Bristol Brunel academy finds Damien Egan visit was postponed over safeguarding concerns An independent inquiry into a Bristol ...

item.title: Temporary protected status holders add $29bn to US economy, report says
item.description: The findings land before supreme court hearing on Trump bid to end protections for Syrians and Haitians Sign up for the Breaking News US email to get ...

item.title: Trump pushes baseless claim that Virginia redistricting vote was ‘rigged’ – live
item.description: President also claims that language for referendum was ‘purposefully unintelligible’, adding that he ‘had no idea what they were talking about’ Democr...

item.title: 'It's like someone waved a magic wand': Girl, 6, has sight restored by gene therapy
item.description: Saffie's mum says Luxturna therapy at Great Ormond Street has been like "someone waved a magic wand".

item.title: Hapless Chelsea owners have built a monument to chaos and decline
item.description: Chelsea owners BlueCo have built a monument to chaos and decline at Stamford Bridge, says BBC Sport chief football writer Phil McNulty.

item.title: Rosenior sacked by Chelsea after three months in charge
item.description: Chelsea sack head coach Liam Rosenior after losing five consecutive Premier League matches without scoring for the first time since 1912.

item.title: Keir Starmer v The Civil Service
item.description: What effect has the Mandelson saga had on the PM’s relationship with the civil service?

item.title: Head coach Liam Rosenior sacked by Chelsea after three months in charge
item.description: Chelsea sack head coach Liam Rosenior after losing five consecutive Premier League matches without scoring for the first time since 1912.
